patch.value:
## Problem\nThe default root help currently advertises three runtime data providers as if agents should invoke them directly: completion-statuses, completion-tags, and completion-types. This adds three nouns to the discovery surface without adding user capability.\n\n## Desired design\nTreat these entrypoints like internal completion plumbing. The public # bash completion for pm
# Source this file or add 'eval "$(pm completion bash)"' to ~/.bashrc

_pm_completion_type_choices() {
  local now ttl cache_ts resolved
  now="$(date +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
  ttl="${PM_COMPLETION_TYPE_TTL:-120}"
  cache_ts="${PM_COMPLETION_TYPE_CACHE_TS:-0}"
  if [[ -n "${PM_COMPLETION_TYPE_CACHE:-}" && "$now" -ne 0 && $((now - cache_ts)) -lt "$ttl" ]]; then
    printf '%s\n' "$PM_COMPLETION_TYPE_CACHE"
    return 0
  fi
  resolved="$(pm completion-types 2>/dev/null)"
  if [[ -z "$resolved" ]]; then
    resolved="Chore Decision Epic Event Feature Issue Meeting Milestone Plan Reminder Story Task"
  fi
  PM_COMPLETION_TYPE_CACHE="$resolved"
  PM_COMPLETION_TYPE_CACHE_TS="$now"
  printf '%s\n' "$PM_COMPLETION_TYPE_CACHE"
}

_pm_completion_status_choices() {
  local now ttl cache_ts resolved
  now="$(date +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
  ttl="${PM_COMPLETION_STATUS_TTL:-120}"
  cache_ts="${PM_COMPLETION_STATUS_CACHE_TS:-0}"
  if [[ -n "${PM_COMPLETION_STATUS_CACHE:-}" && "$now" -ne 0 && $((now - cache_ts)) -lt "$ttl" ]]; then
    printf '%s\n' "$PM_COMPLETION_STATUS_CACHE"
    return 0
  fi
  resolved="$(pm completion-statuses 2>/dev/null)"
  if [[ -z "$resolved" ]]; then
    resolved="blocked canceled closed draft in_progress open"
  fi
  PM_COMPLETION_STATUS_CACHE="$resolved"
  PM_COMPLETION_STATUS_CACHE_TS="$now"
  printf '%s\n' "$PM_COMPLETION_STATUS_CACHE"
}

_pm_completion() {
  local cur prev words cword
  _init_completion 2>/dev/null || {
    cur="${COMP_WORDS[COMP_CWORD]}"
    prev="${COMP_WORDS[COMP_CWORD-1]}"
    cword=$COMP_CWORD
  }

  if [[ $cword -eq 1 ]]; then
    COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "init config extension package packages install upgrade create copy focus list list-all list-draft list-open list-in-progress list-blocked list-closed list-canceled aggregate context ctx get graph search eval next history history-redact history-repair history-compact schema profile activity restore update update-many close close-many delete append comments notes learnings files docs deps plan test test-all telemetry stats health validate gc contracts claim release start-task pause-task close-task meet event remind help" -- "$cur"))
    return 0
  fi

  if [[ "$prev" == "--type" ]]; then
    COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "$(_pm_completion_type_choices)" -- "$cur"))
    return 0
  fi

  if [[ "$prev" == "--status" ]]; then
    COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "$(_pm_completion_status_choices)" -- "$cur"))
    return 0
  fi

  if [[ "$prev" == "--tag" || "$prev" == "--tags" ]]; then
    local now ttl cache_ts tag_values
    now="$(date +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
    ttl="${PM_COMPLETION_TAG_TTL:-120}"
    cache_ts="${PM_COMPLETION_TAG_CACHE_TS:-0}"
    tag_values="${PM_COMPLETION_TAG_CACHE:-}"
    if [[ -z "$tag_values" || "$now" -eq 0 || $((now - cache_ts)) -ge "$ttl" ]]; then
      tag_values="$(pm completion-tags 2>/dev/null)"
      PM_COMPLETION_TAG_CACHE="$tag_values"
      PM_COMPLETION_TAG_CACHE_TS="$now"
    fi
    COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "$tag_values" -- "$cur"))
    return 0
  fi

  local cmd="${COMP_WORDS[1]}"

  case "$cmd" in
    list|list-all|list-draft|list-open|list-in-progress|list-blocked|list-closed|list-canceled)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--after --all --assignee --assignee_filter --assignee-filter --author --brief --compact --created-after --created-before --deadline-after --deadline-before --empty-body --fields --filter-ac-missing --filter-confidence-missing --filter-docs-missing --filter-estimate-missing --filter-estimates-missing --filter-files-missing --filter-metadata-missing --filter-release-missing --filter-resolution-missing --filter-reviewer-missing --filter-risk-missing --filter-sprint-missing --format --full --has-body --has-comments --has-deps --has-docs --has-files --has-learnings --has-linked-command --has-notes --has-tests --help --id-only --ids --include-body --json --limit --no-changed-fields --no-comments --no-deps --no-docs --no-extensions --no-files --no-learnings --no-linked-command --no-notes --no-pager --no-tests --no-truncate --offset --order --parent --path --pm-path --priority --profile --quiet --recent --release --sort --sprint --status --stream --tag --tags --today --tree --tree_depth --tree-depth --type --updated-after --updated-before" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    aggregate)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--group-by --count --completion --sum --avg --include-unparented --include_unparented --status --type --tag --priority --deadline-before --deadline-after --assignee --assignee-filter --assignee_filter --parent --sprint --release --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    create)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--ac --acceptance_criteria --acceptance-criteria --actual --actual_result --actual-result --add_tags --add-tags --affected_version --affected-version --allow-missing-parent --assignee --author --blocked_by --blocked_reason --blocked-by --blocked-reason --body --body-file --clear-comments --clear-deps --clear-docs --clear-events --clear-files --clear-learnings --clear-notes --clear-reminders --clear-tests --clear-type-options --comment --component --confidence --create_mode --create-mode --customer_impact --customer-impact --deadline --definition_of_ready --definition-of-ready --dep --description --doc --environment --estimate --estimated_minutes --estimated-minutes --event --expected --expected_result --expected-result --field --file --fixed_version --fixed-version --goal --help --id --id-only --impact --json --learning --message --no-changed-fields --no-extensions --no-pager --note --objective --order --outcome --parent --path --pm-path --priority --profile --quiet --rank --regression --release --reminder --reporter --repro_steps --repro-steps --resolution --reviewer --risk --schedule_preset --schedule-preset --severity --sprint --status --tag --tags --template --test --title --type --type_option --type-option --unblock_note --unblock-note --unset --value --why_now --why-now -b -d -p -s -t" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    copy)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--title --author --message --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    focus)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--clear --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    update)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--ac --acceptance_criteria --acceptance-criteria --actual --actual_result --actual-result --add_tags --add-tags --affected_version --affected-version --assignee --author --blocked_by --blocked_reason --blocked-by --blocked-reason --body --body-file --clear-comments --clear-deps --clear-docs --clear-events --clear-files --clear-learnings --clear-notes --clear-reminders --clear-tests --clear-type-options --close_reason --close-reason --comment --component --confidence --customer_impact --customer-impact --deadline --definition_of_ready --definition-of-ready --dep --dep_remove --dep-remove --description --doc --environment --estimate --estimated_minutes --estimated-minutes --event --expected --expected_result --expected-result --field --file --fixed_version --fixed-version --force --goal --help --id-only --impact --json --learning --message --no-changed-fields --no-extensions --no-pager --note --objective --order --outcome --parent --path --pm-path --priority --profile --quiet --rank --regression --release --reminder --remove_tags --remove-tags --replace-deps --replace-tests --reporter --repro_steps --repro-steps --resolution --reviewer --risk --severity --sprint --status --tag --tags --test --title --type --type_option --type-option --unblock_note --unblock-note --unset --value --why_now --why-now -b -d -p -s -t" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    update-many)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--ac --acceptance_criteria --acceptance-criteria --actual --actual_result --actual-result --add_tags --add-tags --affected_version --affected-version --author --body --clear-comments --clear-deps --clear-docs --clear-events --clear-files --clear-learnings --clear-notes --clear-reminders --clear-tests --clear-type-options --comment --component --confidence --customer_impact --customer-impact --deadline --definition_of_ready --definition-of-ready --dep --dep_remove --dep-remove --description --doc --dry-run --environment --estimate --estimated_minutes --estimated-minutes --event --expected --expected_result --expected-result --file --filter-ac-missing --filter-assignee --filter-assignee_filter --filter-assignee-filter --filter-confidence-missing --filter-created-after --filter-created-before --filter-deadline-after --filter-deadline-before --filter-empty-body --filter-estimate-missing --filter-estimates-missing --filter-has-body --filter-has-comments --filter-has-deps --filter-has-docs --filter-has-files --filter-has-learnings --filter-has-linked-command --filter-has-notes --filter-has-tests --filter-metadata-missing --filter-no-comments --filter-no-deps --filter-no-docs --filter-no-files --filter-no-learnings --filter-no-linked-command --filter-no-notes --filter-no-tests --filter-parent --filter-priority --filter-release --filter-release-missing --filter-resolution-missing --filter-reviewer-missing --filter-risk-missing --filter-sprint --filter-sprint-missing --filter-status --filter-tag --filter-type --filter-updated-after --filter-updated-before --fixed_version --fixed-version --force --goal --help --id-only --ids --impact --json --learning --limit --message --no-changed-fields --no-checkpoint --no-extensions --no-pager --note --objective --offset --order --outcome --path --pm-path --priority --profile --quiet --rank --regression --release --reminder --remove_tags --remove-tags --replace-deps --replace-tests --reporter --repro_steps --repro-steps --resolution --reviewer --risk --rollback --severity --sprint --tag --tags --test --title --type --type_option --type-option --unset --value --why_now --why-now -b -d -p -t" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    calendar|cal)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--assignee --assignee_filter --assignee-filter --author --date --format --from --full_period --full-period --help --id-only --include --json --limit --no-changed-fields --no-extensions --no-pager --occurrence-limit --past --path --pm-path --priority --profile --quiet --recurrence-lookahead-days --recurrence-lookback-days --release --sprint --status --tag --to --type --view" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    context|ctx)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--activity-limit --after --assignee --assignee_filter --assignee-filter --author --date --depth --explain_ranking --explain-ranking --fields --format --from --help --id-only --json --limit --max-items --no-changed-fields --no-extensions --no-pager --parent --past --path --pm-path --priority --profile --quiet --release --section --sprint --stale-threshold --tag --to --type" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    next)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--type --tag --priority --assignee --assignee-filter --assignee_filter --sprint --release --parent --limit --blocked-limit --blocked_limit --ready-only --ready_only --format --explain-ranking --explain_ranking --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    guide)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--list --format --depth --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author commands extensions harnesses quickstart release sdk skills workflows" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    search)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--after --assignee --author --compact --count --created-after --created-before --deadline-after --deadline-before --empty-body --fields --filter-confidence-missing --filter-docs-missing --filter-files-missing --filter-release-missing --filter-reviewer-missing --filter-risk-missing --filter-sprint-missing --format --full --has-body --has-comments --has-deps --has-docs --has-files --has-learnings --has-linked-command --has-notes --has-tests --help --highlight --hybrid --id-only --include-linked --json --limit --match-mode --min-score --mode --no-changed-fields --no-comments --no-deps --no-docs --no-extensions --no-files --no-learnings --no-linked-command --no-notes --no-pager --no-tests --parent --path --phrase-exact --pm-path --priority --profile --quiet --release --semantic --semantic-weight --sprint --status --tag --tags --title-exact --type --updated-after --updated-before" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    reindex)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--mode --progress --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    init)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--id-prefix --prefix --preset --type-preset -y --defaults --yes --author --agent-guidance --with-packages --workspace --force --verbose --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    config)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--criterion --clear-criteria --format --policy --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    extension)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "init scaffold install uninstall explore manage describe reload doctor catalog adopt adopt-all activate deactivate --init --scaffold --capability --install --uninstall --explore --list --manage --describe --markdown --output --reload --watch --doctor --catalog --adopt --adopt-all --activate --deactivate --project --local --global --gh --github --ref --detail --trace --runtime-probe --fix-managed-state --isolated --ignore-global --strict-exit --fail-on-warn --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    package|packages)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "init scaffold install uninstall explore manage describe reload doctor catalog adopt adopt-all activate deactivate --init --scaffold --capability --install --uninstall --explore --list --manage --describe --markdown --output --reload --watch --doctor --catalog --adopt --adopt-all --activate --deactivate --project --local --global --gh --github --ref --detail --trace --runtime-probe --fix-managed-state --isolated --ignore-global --strict-exit --fail-on-warn --declarative --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    comments)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--add --body --stdin --file --edit --delete --limit --author --message --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    notes)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--add --stdin --file --edit --delete --limit --author --message --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    learnings)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--add --stdin --file --edit --delete --limit --author --message --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    files)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "discover --add --add-glob --remove --migrate --list --apply --note --append-stable --validate-paths --author --message --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    docs)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--add --add-glob --remove --migrate --note --validate-paths --author --message --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    append)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "-b --body --author --message --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    deps)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--format --max-depth --collapse --summary --node-limit --edge-limit --token-budget --cursor --direction --kind --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    graph)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "ancestors descendants predecessors successors paths impact analyze audit communities redundancy dominators plan --kind --max-depth --limit --after --direction --max-paths --sample --exempt-isolate --summary --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    test)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--add --add-json --remove --list --run --match --only-index --only-last --background --timeout --progress --env-set --env-clear --shared-host-safe --pm-context --override-linked-pm-context --fail-on-context-mismatch --fail-on-skipped --fail-on-empty-test-run --require-assertions-for-pm --check-context --auto-pm-context --author --message --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    test-all)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--status --limit --offset --background --timeout --progress --env-set --env-clear --shared-host-safe --pm-context --override-linked-pm-context --fail-on-context-mismatch --fail-on-skipped --fail-on-empty-test-run --require-assertions-for-pm --check-context --auto-pm-context --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    test-runs)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "list status logs stop resume --status --limit --stream --tail --force --author --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    validate)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--check-metadata --metadata-profile --check-resolution --check-lifecycle --check-stale-blockers --dependency-cycle-severity --parent-cycle-severity --check-files --scan-mode --include-pm-internals --verbose-file-lists --verbose-diagnostics --all-affected-ids --strict-exit --fail-on-warn --fix-hints --auto-fix --dry-run --fix-scope --prune-missing --check-history-drift --check-command-references --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    health)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--strict-directories --strict-exit --fail-on-warn --check-only --check-telemetry --no-refresh --refresh-vectors --verbose-stale-items --brief --summary --skip-vectors --skip-integrity --skip-drift --full --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    history)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--limit --compact --full --diff --field --verify --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    history-compact)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--before --ids --all-over --closed --all-streams --min-entries --dry-run --author --message --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    get)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--depth --full --fields --at --tree --tree-depth --tree_depth --format --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    history-redact)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--literal --regex --replacement --dry-run --author --message --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    history-repair)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--all --dry-run --author --message --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    schema)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "list show show-status add-type remove-type add-status remove-status add-field remove-field list-fields show-field apply-preset --description --default-status --folder --alias --role --order --type --commands --cli-flag --required --required-on-create --no-allow-unset --required-types --infer --min-count --apply --author --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    profile)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "list show apply lint agile ops research --dry-run --author --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    plan)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "create show add-step update-step complete-step block-step reorder-step remove-step link unlink decision discovery validation resume approve materialize --title --description --scope --parent --related --blocks --blocked-by --blocked_by --harness --mode --resume-context --resume_context --tags --tag --priority --body --claim --from-search --from_search --template --step-title --step_title --step --step-body --step_body --step-owner --step_owner --step-status --step_status --step-evidence --step_evidence --step-blocked-reason --step_blocked_reason --step-replacement --step_replacement --depends-on --depends_on --link --link-kind --link_kind --link-note --link_note --promote-to-item-dep --promote_to_item_dep --allow-multiple-active --allow_multiple_active --file --test --doc --decision-text --decision_text --decision --decision-rationale --decision_rationale --decision-evidence --decision_evidence --discovery-text --discovery_text --discovery --validation-text --validation_text --validation --validation-command --validation_command --validation-expected --validation_expected --depth --field --fields --steps --materialize-type --materialize_type --materialize-parent --materialize_parent --materialize-tags --materialize_tags --author --message --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    activity)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--id --op --author --from --to --limit --compact --full --stream --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    contracts)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--action --command --summary --schema-only --flags-only --availability-only --runtime-only --active-only --full --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    gc)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--dry-run --scope --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    stats)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--storage --metadata-coverage --field-utilization --by-assignee --by-tag --by-priority --tag-prefix --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    close|close-task)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--author --message --validate-close --duplicate-of --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    close-many)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--filter-status --filter-type --filter-tag --filter-priority --filter-deadline-before --filter-deadline-after --filter-updated-after --filter-updated-before --filter-created-after --filter-created-before --filter-assignee --filter-assignee-filter --filter-assignee_filter --filter-parent --filter-sprint --filter-release --filter-reviewer-missing --filter-risk-missing --filter-confidence-missing --filter-sprint-missing --filter-release-missing --filter-has-notes --filter-no-notes --filter-has-learnings --filter-no-learnings --filter-has-files --filter-no-files --filter-has-docs --filter-no-docs --filter-has-tests --filter-no-tests --filter-has-comments --filter-no-comments --filter-has-deps --filter-no-deps --filter-has-body --filter-empty-body --filter-has-linked-command --filter-no-linked-command --ids --limit --offset --reason --resolution --expected-result --expected_result --expected --actual-result --actual_result --actual --validate-close --author --message --force --dry-run --rollback --no-checkpoint --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    release)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--author --message --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    delete)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--dry-run --author --message --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    claim|restore|start-task|pause-task)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--author --message --force --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    meet|event)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--start --duration --end --location --timezone --all-day --parent --allow-missing-parent --tags --priority --body --description --author --message --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    remind)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--at --text --parent --allow-missing-parent --tags --priority --body --description --author --message --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    completion)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--eager-tags --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author bash zsh fish" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    templates)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "save list show" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    *)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author --version" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
  esac
  return 0
}

complete -F _pm_completion pm noun remains discoverable; generated shell scripts keep a stable way to request live schema values; internal helpers are hidden from ordinary help/contracts/docs/MCP enumeration and may be routed beneath # bash completion for pm
# Source this file or add 'eval "$(pm completion bash)"' to ~/.bashrc

_pm_completion_type_choices() {
  local now ttl cache_ts resolved
  now="$(date +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
  ttl="${PM_COMPLETION_TYPE_TTL:-120}"
  cache_ts="${PM_COMPLETION_TYPE_CACHE_TS:-0}"
  if [[ -n "${PM_COMPLETION_TYPE_CACHE:-}" && "$now" -ne 0 && $((now - cache_ts)) -lt "$ttl" ]]; then
    printf '%s\n' "$PM_COMPLETION_TYPE_CACHE"
    return 0
  fi
  resolved="$(pm completion-types 2>/dev/null)"
  if [[ -z "$resolved" ]]; then
    resolved="Chore Decision Epic Event Feature Issue Meeting Milestone Plan Reminder Story Task"
  fi
  PM_COMPLETION_TYPE_CACHE="$resolved"
  PM_COMPLETION_TYPE_CACHE_TS="$now"
  printf '%s\n' "$PM_COMPLETION_TYPE_CACHE"
}

_pm_completion_status_choices() {
  local now ttl cache_ts resolved
  now="$(date +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
  ttl="${PM_COMPLETION_STATUS_TTL:-120}"
  cache_ts="${PM_COMPLETION_STATUS_CACHE_TS:-0}"
  if [[ -n "${PM_COMPLETION_STATUS_CACHE:-}" && "$now" -ne 0 && $((now - cache_ts)) -lt "$ttl" ]]; then
    printf '%s\n' "$PM_COMPLETION_STATUS_CACHE"
    return 0
  fi
  resolved="$(pm completion-statuses 2>/dev/null)"
  if [[ -z "$resolved" ]]; then
    resolved="blocked canceled closed draft in_progress open"
  fi
  PM_COMPLETION_STATUS_CACHE="$resolved"
  PM_COMPLETION_STATUS_CACHE_TS="$now"
  printf '%s\n' "$PM_COMPLETION_STATUS_CACHE"
}

_pm_completion() {
  local cur prev words cword
  _init_completion 2>/dev/null || {
    cur="${COMP_WORDS[COMP_CWORD]}"
    prev="${COMP_WORDS[COMP_CWORD-1]}"
    cword=$COMP_CWORD
  }

  if [[ $cword -eq 1 ]]; then
    COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "init config extension package packages install upgrade create copy focus list list-all list-draft list-open list-in-progress list-blocked list-closed list-canceled aggregate context ctx get graph search eval next history history-redact history-repair history-compact schema profile activity restore update update-many close close-many delete append comments notes learnings files docs deps plan test test-all telemetry stats health validate gc contracts claim release start-task pause-task close-task meet event remind help" -- "$cur"))
    return 0
  fi

  if [[ "$prev" == "--type" ]]; then
    COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "$(_pm_completion_type_choices)" -- "$cur"))
    return 0
  fi

  if [[ "$prev" == "--status" ]]; then
    COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "$(_pm_completion_status_choices)" -- "$cur"))
    return 0
  fi

  if [[ "$prev" == "--tag" || "$prev" == "--tags" ]]; then
    local now ttl cache_ts tag_values
    now="$(date +%s 2>/dev/null || echo 0)"
    ttl="${PM_COMPLETION_TAG_TTL:-120}"
    cache_ts="${PM_COMPLETION_TAG_CACHE_TS:-0}"
    tag_values="${PM_COMPLETION_TAG_CACHE:-}"
    if [[ -z "$tag_values" || "$now" -eq 0 || $((now - cache_ts)) -ge "$ttl" ]]; then
      tag_values="$(pm completion-tags 2>/dev/null)"
      PM_COMPLETION_TAG_CACHE="$tag_values"
      PM_COMPLETION_TAG_CACHE_TS="$now"
    fi
    COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "$tag_values" -- "$cur"))
    return 0
  fi

  local cmd="${COMP_WORDS[1]}"

  case "$cmd" in
    list|list-all|list-draft|list-open|list-in-progress|list-blocked|list-closed|list-canceled)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--after --all --assignee --assignee_filter --assignee-filter --author --brief --compact --created-after --created-before --deadline-after --deadline-before --empty-body --fields --filter-ac-missing --filter-confidence-missing --filter-docs-missing --filter-estimate-missing --filter-estimates-missing --filter-files-missing --filter-metadata-missing --filter-release-missing --filter-resolution-missing --filter-reviewer-missing --filter-risk-missing --filter-sprint-missing --format --full --has-body --has-comments --has-deps --has-docs --has-files --has-learnings --has-linked-command --has-notes --has-tests --help --id-only --ids --include-body --json --limit --no-changed-fields --no-comments --no-deps --no-docs --no-extensions --no-files --no-learnings --no-linked-command --no-notes --no-pager --no-tests --no-truncate --offset --order --parent --path --pm-path --priority --profile --quiet --recent --release --sort --sprint --status --stream --tag --tags --today --tree --tree_depth --tree-depth --type --updated-after --updated-before" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    aggregate)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--group-by --count --completion --sum --avg --include-unparented --include_unparented --status --type --tag --priority --deadline-before --deadline-after --assignee --assignee-filter --assignee_filter --parent --sprint --release --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    create)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--ac --acceptance_criteria --acceptance-criteria --actual --actual_result --actual-result --add_tags --add-tags --affected_version --affected-version --allow-missing-parent --assignee --author --blocked_by --blocked_reason --blocked-by --blocked-reason --body --body-file --clear-comments --clear-deps --clear-docs --clear-events --clear-files --clear-learnings --clear-notes --clear-reminders --clear-tests --clear-type-options --comment --component --confidence --create_mode --create-mode --customer_impact --customer-impact --deadline --definition_of_ready --definition-of-ready --dep --description --doc --environment --estimate --estimated_minutes --estimated-minutes --event --expected --expected_result --expected-result --field --file --fixed_version --fixed-version --goal --help --id --id-only --impact --json --learning --message --no-changed-fields --no-extensions --no-pager --note --objective --order --outcome --parent --path --pm-path --priority --profile --quiet --rank --regression --release --reminder --reporter --repro_steps --repro-steps --resolution --reviewer --risk --schedule_preset --schedule-preset --severity --sprint --status --tag --tags --template --test --title --type --type_option --type-option --unblock_note --unblock-note --unset --value --why_now --why-now -b -d -p -s -t" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    copy)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--title --author --message --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    focus)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--clear --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author" -- "$cur"))

    update)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--ac --acceptance_criteria --acceptance-criteria --actual --actual_result --actual-result --add_tags --add-tags --affected_version --affected-version --assignee --author --blocked_by --blocked_reason --blocked-by --blocked-reason --body --body-file --clear-comments --clear-deps --clear-docs --clear-events --clear-files --clear-learnings --clear-notes --clear-reminders --clear-tests --clear-type-options --close_reason --close-reason --comment --component --confidence --customer_impact --customer-impact --deadline --definition_of_ready --definition-of-ready --dep --dep_remove --dep-remove --description --doc --environment --estimate --estimated_minutes --estimated-minutes --event --expected --expected_result --expected-result --field --file --fixed_version --fixed-version --force --goal --help --id-only --impact --json --learning --message --no-changed-fields --no-extensions --no-pager --note --objective --order --outcome --parent --path --pm-path --priority --profile --quiet --rank --regression --release --reminder --remove_tags --remove-tags --replace-deps --replace-tests --reporter --repro_steps --repro-steps --resolution --reviewer --risk --severity --sprint --status --tag --tags --test --title --type --type_option --type-option --unblock_note --unblock-note --unset --value --why_now --why-now -b -d -p -s -t" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    update-many)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--ac --acceptance_criteria --acceptance-criteria --actual --actual_result --actual-result --add_tags --add-tags --affected_version --affected-version --author --body --customer_impact --customer-impact --deadline --definition_of_ready --definition-of-ready --dep --dep_remove --dep-remove --description --doc --dry-run --environment --estimate --estimated_minutes --estimated-minutes --event --expected --expected_result --expected-result --file --filter-ac-missing --filter-assignee --filter-assignee_filter --filter-assignee-filter --filter-confidence-missing       ;;
    meet|event)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--start --duration --end --location --timezone --all-day --parent --allow-missing-parent --tags --priority --body --description --author --message --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    remind)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--at --text --parent --allow-missing-parent --tags --priority --body --description --author --message --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    completion)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--eager-tags --json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author bash zsh fish" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    templates)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "save list show" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
    *)
      COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--json --quiet --no-changed-fields --id-only --pm-path --path --no-extensions --no-pager --profile --help --author --version" -- "$cur"))
      ;;
  esac
  return 0
}

complete -F _pm_completion pm verbs or an explicit internal registry.\n\n## Verification\nMeasure root-help and compact-contract token deltas; snapshot the generated bash/zsh/fish scripts; execute each completion path against built-in plus custom types/statuses/tags; prove old helper spellings remain compatibility aliases or internal entrypoints until the grammar migration policy permits removal.\n\n## Duplicate check\nAll-status exact-title searches for each helper returned zero items. Focused all-term search for runtime resolved shell completion helper hiding found only closed general help/completion work and no focused open owner. Related scopes are pm-e2bq (tiered help), pm-mu8m (generated completion/contracts surfaces), and pm-lp4j (internal worker hiding).
Hide runtime completion helper entrypoints from the default agent-facing command surface

The live 2026-07-18 root command census exposes completion-statuses, completion-tags, and completion-types as ordinary top-level commands even though they are runtime plumbing used by generated shell completion scripts. Preserve every completion capability and explicit internal invocation path, but hide these helpers from default help, compact contracts, docs, MCP discovery, and the canonical grammar budget.

Default pm --help and compact contracts do not list completion-statuses, completion-tags, or completion-types; generated bash/zsh/fish completion still resolves runtime statuses, tags, and types; an explicit internal or completion-plumbing discovery path remains testable; byte-for-byte completion behavior and exit semantics are preserved; snapshots, contracts, docs, and token-budget baselines prove zero feature loss and reduced default surface.

All-status exact-title searches for all three returned zero items; the focused all-term search returned only closed general help/completion work. Canonical related owners are pm-e2bq, pm-mu8m, and pm-lp4j. This task removes only discovery-surface noise and explicitly preserves every completion capability.

value.author: codex-ecosystem-planner
value.text: Command-surface audits must classify visibility as well as capability: a runtime helper can be correct, tested, and required by shell completion while still being harmful in default agent discovery. Contracts need an explicit public, compatibility-alias, extension-owned, or internal-plumbing visibility class so generated help cannot re-promote helpers accidentally.

author: codex-ecosystem-planner

patch.value:
## Problem
The default root help currently advertises three runtime data providers as if agents should invoke them directly: completion-statuses, completion-tags, and completion-types. This adds three nouns to the discovery surface without adding user capability.

## Desired design
Treat these entrypoints as internal completion plumbing. The public pm completion noun remains discoverable; generated shell scripts keep a stable way to request live schema values; internal helpers are hidden from ordinary help, contracts, docs, and MCP enumeration and may be routed beneath completion verbs or an explicit internal registry.

## Verification
Measure root-help and compact-contract token deltas; snapshot generated bash, zsh, and fish scripts; execute each completion path against built-in plus custom types, statuses, and tags; prove old helper spellings remain compatibility aliases or internal entrypoints until the grammar migration policy permits removal.

## Duplicate check
All-status exact-title searches for each helper returned zero items. Focused all-term search for runtime resolved shell completion helper hiding found only closed general help/completion work and no focused open owner. Related scopes are pm-e2bq for tiered help, pm-mu8m for generated completion/contracts surfaces, and pm-lp4j for internal worker hiding.
